content_body:
Ott Farms and Vineyard is located in Ellijay, Georgia, on 20+ acres of Gilmer County's most beautiful land with mountain views. They currently have 8+ acres of French-American hybrid grapes planted. Boasting an 1800 square foot tasting room with a vaulted covered pavilion and covered porch, they are ready to accommodate anyone come rain or shine! Enjoy local food trucks on the weekends or bring a picnic yourself.

Enjoy Live Music - on Saturday & Sunday 1:30 pm to 5:30 pm
title: Ott Farms and Vineyard
